name: Invert Binary Tree
description: Given the root of a binary tree, invert the tree (mirror it), and return its root. Inverting means swapping every left child with its corresponding right child.
constraints: The number of nodes is in the range [0, 100]. -100 <= Node.val <= 100.

performance.stress_intent: exercise whole-tree rewrites; constraints are too small to separate linear traversals beyond obvious repeated rescans
